title: Telescopic Folding Fishing Landing Net, 1.9m Pole Collapsible Extensible Aluminum long Handle,Stainless Steel Triangular,For Bird Fish Catch,Aquarium,Ponds Floating Objects,Carp Trout
features: 【3-section telescopic design】 The 3-section telescopic handle extends from 41cm to 155cm, long enough allows the extra reach needed to reach your reach. The durable, tangle-free, coated fine mesh net makes it easy to catch large or small fish.

【Safe catch and quick release】 With intensive honeycomb structure and ideal depth, it is not easy to escape the fish, the net makes it easy to catch and release. The soft and durable net will not hurt the fish scales. The fishing mesh fabric is designed to be less easily hooked, and the locking mechanism for the telescopic pole is not a plastic switch, its special coating prevents the hook points from getting stuck in the net, easy to open and hold .

【Folding handle】 40 cm wide and 38 cm deep, fishing net weight: 0.4 kg, the frame is not heavy. Retractable design, the fishing net folds up at the push of a button for simple storage in your fishing tool bag, on the boat, in your garage or at home. It takes up less space and is easy to store, convenient to carry.

【High-quality material】 Stainless steel material is harder, more durable, and less prone to breakage than aluminum alloy material.Special materials do not harm fish scales and can effectively prevent the growth of bacteria and odor.Made of durable 4mm fishnet nylon mesh, the landing net of wading has a large load capacity, the net can support up to 10 kg and the pole can support up to 6 kg.

【Wide Range of Applications】 Also makes a great net for both beginner and experienced anglers. Suitable for stream fishing, river fishing, lake fishing, boat fishing, etc. great for catching large fish such as carp, trout, etc., as well as small creatures such as birds, butterflies, dragonfly, etc. as well can be used to collect algae from the river.
description: Product Description WANGDEFU Telescopic Folding Fishing Landing Net,1.5m Stainless Steel Pole,Collapsible Extensible Long Handle,Triangular Net,For Bird Fish Catch Telescopic fishing net When fishing, it is always advisable, sometimes even mandatory, to have a net with you to get the fish out of the water easily and correctly. Due to its light weight and small size, this foldable fishing net is especially recommended for anglers who often move on foot or change locations. 155cm telescopic fishing keister The net is telescopic up to 155cm(61 inch) and has High quality nylon mesh net. As a result, hooks and triplets can be removed much easier than with a conventional nylon net. Folding Stainless Steel pole High-density Stainless Steel pole,Stainless steel material is harder, more durable, and less prone to breakage than aluminum alloy material. durable nylon and strong hexagonal structure mesh,skid-resistant EVA handhold makes the fishing net solid and durable. The folding style will be easy to carry and transport,save your space. Lightweight Only 0.89lb/0.97lb, lightweight design make this fishing net even suitable for kids. Product Details: Extended length: 155cm(61in) Folded length:20in Frame size: 15.7 x 14.6in Hoop Size:16"x13" Weight:0.97 lb Material: Stainless Steel pole,rubber handle,stainless steel mesh frame,Rubber Coating Nylon Mesh Top quality nylon mesh Made of 0.32in high quality nylon mesh,will no tangle with hook,waterproof,no harm for fish, prevent net from waterlogging or odor absorption, easy to clean net. The fishing hooks can be easily detached from this nylon net. In addition, the net is easy to clean and dry again quickly. Do No Harm to Fish The nets are gentler on the fishes’ slime coating, letting you catch the fish without injuring them.Non-absorbent coating prevents the net from waterlogging or odor absorption. The nylon net is very easy to clean and offers triplets and hooks no chance of catching. The mesh size is 6mm and not only catches small fish, lobster and small crabs, but also protects the fish scales for safe catching or releasing. The net has a PVC resin adhesive topolyester yarn, even absorbs water and does not become heavy when used. Stable closure On the net head there is a large and sturdy plastic closure. This can be operated with one hand. This results in two fiberglass brackets of the net. How to stretch the fishing net Pull the spring clip down and tighten the tires. Loosen the screw and stretch the rod. How to stretch the fishing net Pull the spring clip down. Pull the spring clip down.
